已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case

decision.archive_summary: Earlier work added repo regression coverage and fixed the Codex minor GC behavior for Chinese multi-turn topic switching.
